ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., G, F, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "year_of_eligibility" TEXT /* Year of eligibility (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore, Junior, Senior) */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away, Neutral) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Conference, Postseason) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "a" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "three_point_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "turnovers_for" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player's team */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Technical fouls */,
  "flagrant_fouls" INTEGER /* Flagrant fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "conference_championship" INTEGER /* Whether the team won the conference championship */,
  "postseason_appearance" INTEGER /* Whether the team made a postseason appearance */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "a" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "three_point_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "turnovers_for" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player's team */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Technical fouls */,
  "flagrant_fouls" INTEGER /* Flagrant fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* Names of the assistant coaches (comma-separated) */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id", "season_id")
)
